segments.text: Today we are going to worship the Adi Shakti and reflection of Adisakti within you is Kundalini.
We can say this is a worship for the Adishakti or Adikundalini, if You understand that
All this, whatever is created on the universe and in many universes
Is a work of the Adi Shakti.
Now people believe that there's one God
It´s true
There' s One God
God Almighty
But He has His own powers
Which he can embody into someone
and can get his own manifestation expressed.
So first of all he did was to create the power
of Adi Shakti, when it was created then there
a sound that we call as Aum Logos or anything
you called by the primordial sound
And these three powers came out of that sound, is A, U and M.
The Arishakti is the one who embodies
desire
God Almighty
The desire of God Almighty comes out of His compassion and for his own expression,
For is own manifestation.
I would say that He must be tired
Of loneliness so he must have thought
creating a partner who will manifest his desires. Thus the power of God Almighty
separated from him and formed an embodiment
of His compassion, His desire to create.
They say in Sanskrit they use the word chitvilas
is the enjoyment
of the Adi Shakti
Chid as you know it's chitta
is attention

and

Of Her Attention

Not straight forward create human beings

This evolution had work out
in a way because they have to know from where it comes
We should know we come from nature

her own Kundalini.
And she too is not just a dead-earth but She knows –She thinks–she understands
…and She regulates!
You can see in The Nature how every tree
tree has got its own limitations, how every fruit is produced in a particular tree.
How it happens?
What works out this kind of regulation if Mother Earth was moving with higher speed
than what It Is today we would not have been born even – would've had less
speed it would not have worked out.
See the whole plan that was made, is a beautiful plant but Mother Earth has to move around
The Sun in such manner different seasons are created and thats why the power, which
which is the power of Dadi Shakti, it's also called as Ritambhara Pragya.

All the organization
and all creation
In our human ego
we start thinking
That we do something
We can create

Whatever is created out that may combine and put together something but if you see
that this whole thing is nothing but beyond our any power.
We cannot create anything,
But what do we create
Is
Our myths I should say
For example
Something is made of gold
Still it's gold
Now something

so

what ever maybe country you are born
What ever
Maybe
Your culture
You're human beings
Basically
All
Are the same
You laugh the same

I haven't seen anybody crying with his hands,
tears falling out of His fingers – look there!
And that is how one has to realize
we are all bound by some common principle
and a common principle
life that is bound us by the Adi Shakti, it's
we all have Kundalini within
All human beings
have kundalini within
It not in animals also

Its not yet what you call
full form of kundali
That can be awakened
But
In a human form only
It has evolved as a connection,
As the one that is the Divine force within us
which Is The Reflection of the Adi Kundalini
Which Is so easily awakened in this Kali Yuga.
This Is common principle we all have
So We Have to respect All People
All the human beings, whatever nation they come from

What ever color there are

Who are enlightened

of the Primordial Mother.

What we feel

for example even

what should be do

From here only There are vibration how

so then He sat down
and Started wondering Now How
I find out, where did Mother take her birth?
He was sitting down and then he saw the star which is Venus.

So this whole plan…
The whole thing …is not done haphazardly in any way if you see every tree has leaves

who came, also carbon – came from the Mother Earth.

You know yourself.

A Very Big Jump

It is so close, it's so ingrained ,so much built in and that should give you full control

And your development they describe between various ways . That
You must surrender now one surrenders of course with fear if somebody comes

That surrender is just force-taunting.
All such surrenders have been creating problems because it had reaction but your

That soluble nature it's really joy giving if you can just feel that within yourself
that you are one with the Divine, you're dissolved in the ocean of the Divine.
And then what takes your form is nothing but extreme love compassion and as a result
extreme joy!
